title: Bernardinia fluminensis
taxonomy: Bernardinia fluminensis belongs to the family Rutaceae. This classification suggests that Bernardinia fluminensis is closely related to citrus and related genera within the Rutaceae family. The Rutaceae family is commonly known as the citrus or rue family. Members of the Rutaceae family are predominantly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This classification indicates that Bernardinia fluminensis has characteristics similar to those of other plants within the Rutaceae family.
